title: Self Dick
lyrics: When it all becomes clear Your fears are here When it all becomes so crystal fucking clear It takes self-discipline To know when you're right To know when you're wrong You hear me or not It takes self-discipline To continue this fight Even though you've been wrong And you can't see anything From what you saw from before It takes self-discipline To ensure it's time to not Ignore all the cats at your doorstep Ignore all the ways That you can't take one more step Why is it that you brought yourself here again? It's just a fall It takes self-discipline To know that's not the end No, no, no It's just the beginning, my friend Of me And me seeing me Give a little self-discipline Make my dreams come true Send a kid ready to go You care about me, how will I do? It takes self-discipline to tell you all to go Fuckin' hell Bye-bye, motherfucker, bye-bye Hope you tell your story well Hope you tell how I was just so outrageous That I made you do shit I've been giving so fucking much And I just wanted a little accountability For the things you asked and how many times I saved you From the war inside of you But now I gotta love you So it's bye-bye Sorry if it needs something up in there But sorry, don't cut it no more You're just a fuckin' bore Would've given if you just would've asked But now I see that it's on me All these things I don't blame I forgive but don't worry We'll never get that close again I got self-discipline For me I don't need to hear Excuses of a mile long I know it's my choice to let me wrong So I build these walls up now So you never get past me That loves me, denies self-discipline I ain't buying nothing inside It's not the hype It's creating love unconditional for you Even though I'm the one that's fucked up now I know it's my choice if you'll let me in So I'm gonna give you a pass this time Motherfucker, this time There won't be a next time Believe that That self-discipline You can't see Your hate won't bring me down, motherfuckin' bitch

lyricsSegments.text: When it all becomes clear Your fears are here
When it all becomes so crystal fucking clear
It takes self-discipline To know when you're right
To know when you're wrong You hear me or not
It takes self-discipline To continue this fight
Even though you've been wrong
And you can't see anything From what you saw from before
It takes self-discipline To ensure it's time to not
Ignore all the cats at your doorstep Ignore all the ways
That you can't take one more step Why is it that you brought yourself here again?
It's just a fall
It takes self-discipline To know that's not the end
No, no, no
It's just the beginning, my friend
Of me
And me seeing me
Give a little self-discipline Make my dreams come true
Send a kid ready to go
You care about me, how will I do?
It takes self-discipline to tell you all to go
Fuckin' hell
Bye-bye, motherfucker, bye-bye
Hope you tell your story well
Hope you tell how I was just so outrageous
That I made you do shit I've been giving so fucking much
And I just wanted a little accountability
For the things you asked and how many times I saved you
From the war inside of you
But now I gotta love you
So it's bye-bye
Sorry if it needs something up in there
But sorry, don't cut it no more
You're just a fuckin' bore
Would've given if you just would've asked
But now I see that it's on me
All these things I don't blame
I forgive but don't worry
We'll never get that close again
I got self-discipline
For me
I don't need to hear
Excuses of a mile long
I know it's my choice to let me wrong
So I build these walls up now
So you never get past me
That loves me, denies self-discipline
I ain't buying nothing inside
It's not the hype
It's creating love unconditional for you
Even though I'm the one that's fucked up now
I know it's my choice if you'll let me in
So I'm gonna give you a pass this time
Motherfucker, this time
There won't be a next time
Believe that
That self-discipline
You can't see
Your hate won't bring me down, motherfuckin' bitch
